observations.note: Generated 34 tests across 4 AC files. 28 fail (RED), 6 pass (pre-existing infrastructure or vacuous empty-output matches).
6 tests pass at baseline: 4 validate pre-existing settings.json (expected), 2 pass vacuously on empty output (acceptable for RED phase).
Used python3 for JSON parsing in tests since jq availability not guaranteed. Consistent with bash test pattern from STORY-528.
